name: Blaster
description: An E-tech assault rifle that fires elemental energy bolts for the cost of two assault rifle rounds per shot. This weapon class handles differently depending on manufacturer, but generally works best at close to medium range because of its slower projectiles and bolt spread. It burns through ammo quickly and can feel clumsy in Fight For Your Life, though the ricochets can still help in some matchups.
notes: With high ranks in Pain is Power, the reduced critical-hit bonus can make headshots deal less damage than body shots in some setups.
